parents.subject: LU-10740 tests: disable tests for replay-dne-zfs-part-4

commit.subject: ATM-1104 tests: run racer in DNE environment
commit.message:
ATM-1104 tests: run racer in DNE environment

Move racer from review-ldsikfs to review-dne-part-2
so that review-ldiskfs is a basic check of functionality.

Test-Parameters: trivial ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientcount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=2 osscount=1 ostcount=8 testlist=racer,racer
Test-Parameters: ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientcount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=2 osscount=1 ostcount=8 testlist=racer,racer
Test-Parameters: ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientcount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=2 osscount=1 ostcount=8 testlist=racer,racer
